title: PO3 5NX, European Metal Recycling Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/LB3408MP/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: European Metal Recycling Limited   Installation name: European Metal Recycling, Dundas Spur   Permit number: EPR/LB3408MP/V002   "
